'''âch-f-z-dh''' ('''kachafzedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monologuize|monologuize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-z-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monologuize|monologuize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âch-f-z-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kachafzedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichafzedhoko|thichafzedhoko]] || [[word:jichafzedhoko|jichafzedhoko]] || [[word:shichafzedhoko|shichafzedhoko]] || [[word:kichafzedhoko|kichafzedhoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
